DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-19-2017 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Keith M. Velleca (415-293-8048) for Plaintiff/opposing party Alfonzo Portillo.
Stephen Moses (408-441-7500) for Defendants/Moving party SWARAN SINGH and KAPAL SINGH.

ARGUED RE: disgorgment cause of action as opposed to a breach of contract cause of action. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTs SWARAN SINGH and KAPAL SINGH's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Taken Under Submission. Defendant to submit propsed order in conformity with tentative ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-02-2017 Continued To Jun-01-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs SWARAN SINGH and KAPAL SINGH's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is Continued to June 1, 2017. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of moving papers, reply and the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than May 12, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
